ksa_text: Manage the data and AI investment portfolio, including initiative prioritization, funding allocation, performance tracking against value hypotheses, portfolio rebalancing based on realized outcomes, and resource allocation decisions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.427) to justify inclusion for the VP Analytics. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Analytics roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Leadership & Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for VP Analytics. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Analytics competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.427) and edge-domain placement (Leadership & Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Analytics. All passes support exclusion.
